facebook.content:
**Prayer Focus: Family**

As we seek to establish a strong foundation for our families, let us pray for those struggling with relationship breakdowns.

"Father, I come to you today with a heart of faith, declaring that every family member is loved, valued, and cherished by you. I speak life and restoration into every household, binding the strongholds of division and releasing the floodgates of love and unity."

Are you standing with us in prayer for families? Drop a prayer emoji to confirm.

instagram.content:
Prayer Focus: Our Children and Families

As we navigate the complexities of life, our families are frequently at the forefront of the battle between faith and doubt. 

"Train up a child in the way he should go: and when he is old, he will not depart from it." - Proverbs 22:6

tiktok.content:
Family prayer focus: "May the Lord establish strong, godly foundations in every home."
"The household of God is built on faith and love." - Colossians 1:18
"Father, we declare Your presence and power in every family, guiding parents to raise godly children and build a legacy of faith.
